product_overview: A React + Vite frontend that displays an application portfolio and per-job pipeline timelines, highlighting human-in-the-loop (HITL) stages and providing navigation between job subviews. The app uses a mock API layer (VITE_MOCK=true) and a consistent left navigation + workspace shell layout.
core_goals: Visualize the full pipeline timeline for each job including status per stage and job metadata.
Surface HITL (human review) work via a prominent CTA that navigates reviewers to the active review node.
Provide an at-a-glance portfolio table of jobs that navigates into individual job workspaces.
Keep a predictable global layout (fixed left navigation + job workspace shell) so users can move quickly between portfolio and job views.
Structure code via Feature-Sliced / Atomic Design so features remain isolated and pages stay thin.

features.name: Job Flow Inspector
features.description: Shows a job's pipeline timeline with per-stage status indicators, a JobMetaPanel for metadata, and a HITL CTA banner when the job status is pending_hitl. Clicking the HITL CTA or stage names navigates to the corresponding job sub-route.
user_flows: Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/201397 -> Wait for Loading... to disappear (80ms mock delay) -> View job heading "201397" with source "/ tu_berlin" -> View HITL banner "HUMAN REVIEW REQUIRED — REVIEW_MATCH" -> Click "GO TO REVIEW →" button -> Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/201397/match -> View pipeline timeline with stage rows (scrape, translate_if_needed, extract_understand, match, review_match, generate_documents, render, package) -> View approved stages with filled dot ● and pending stages with empty dot ○ -> View JobMetaPanel with Thread ID "tu_berlin_201397", Status "pending_hitl", Updated At date

Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/999001 -> Wait for Loading... to disappear -> View job heading "999001" with source "/ tu_berlin" -> Observe no HitlCtaBanner present (job status=completed) -> View all stages as approved (●) -> Click a stage name button (e.g. "match") -> Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/999001/match -> See placeholder text because sub-pages are stubs

features.name: Portfolio Dashboard
features.description: Displays a table of application jobs with status badges and allows navigation into a job workspace by clicking a row.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View heading "Application Portfolio" -> Wait for portfolio summary to load -> View table with job rows for 201397 and 999001 -> Click the 201397 row -> Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/201397 -> See Job Flow Inspector for 201397

Navigate to / -> Wait for portfolio summary to load -> Receive empty or error response from portfolio API (mock or network issue) -> See empty state or error message in the table area -> Click Retry (if available) or inspect network/logs to diagnose VITE_MOCK configuration

features.name: Global Left Navigation
features.description: Fixed left sidebar with quick links to top-level pages (Portfolio, Explorer, Base CV) and persistent across routes.
user_flows: Open app at any route -> See fixed left sidebar with Portfolio, Explorer, Base CV icons -> Click Portfolio icon -> Navigate to / -> View heading "Application Portfolio"

Open app -> Click Explorer icon in left sidebar -> Navigate to /explorer -> View Data Explorer stub message "not yet implemented" -> Click Base CV icon -> Navigate to /cv -> View Base CV editor stub message

features.name: Job Workspace Shell
features.description: Top pipeline bar + breadcrumb that wraps job pages and provides step tabs for Flow, Scrape, Extract, Match, Sculpt, and Deployment. Pages are thin and delegate data fetching to feature hooks.
user_flows: Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/201397 -> Wait for Loading... to disappear -> View breadcrumb with Portfolio link, source "tu_berlin", and jobId "201397" -> View pipeline step tabs (Flow, Scrape, Extract, Match, Sculpt, Deployment) -> Click the Match tab -> Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/201397/match -> See Match page (stub or feature content)

Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/201397 -> Click the Scrape tab -> Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/201397/scrape -> See Scrape diagnostics stub text (known limitation: sub-pages are placeholders) -> Use breadcrumb Portfolio link -> Navigate to / -> Return to portfolio

tech_stack.other: react-router-dom v6, @tanstack/react-query v5, VITE_MOCK=true mock layer

routes.description: Application portfolio — table of all jobs with status badges. Two mock jobs available (201397 pending_hitl, 999001 completed).
Base CV editor stub (not yet implemented)
Job Flow Inspector — shows pipeline timeline, HITL banner if pending_hitl, job metadata. Mock jobs tu_berlin/201397 (pending_hitl) and tu_berlin/999001 (completed).

features.name: Job Flow Inspector
features.description: Shows the full pipeline timeline for a job. Each stage has a colored status dot and name. Completed/approved stages show filled dot (●). Pending stages show empty dot (○). The active HITL stage (needs_review) shows a pulsing dot. When status is pending_hitl, an amber HitlCtaBanner appears with a "GO TO REVIEW →" button. Clicking "GO TO REVIEW →" navigates to the current node's route. JobMetaPanel shows thread_id, status, and updated_at. Job 201397: status=pending_hitl, current_node=review_match, stages include scrape/translate/extract/match (approved), review_match (needs_review), generate_documents/render/package (pending). Job 999001: status=completed, all stages approved, no HitlCtaBanner.
user_interactions: Wait for Loading... to disappear (80ms mock delay)
View job heading "201397" with source "/ tu_berlin"
View HITL banner "HUMAN REVIEW REQUIRED — REVIEW_MATCH" (only for 201397)
Click "GO TO REVIEW →" button to navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/201397/match
View pipeline timeline with stage rows (scrape, translate_if_needed, extract_understand, match, review_match, generate_documents, render, package)
Approved stages show filled dot ●, pending stages show empty dot ○
View JobMetaPanel with Thread ID "tu_berlin_201397", Status "pending_hitl", Updated At date
Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/999001 — no HitlCtaBanner, all stages show ●
Click a stage name button to navigate to its corresponding route

features.name: Portfolio Dashboard
features.description: Displays all application jobs in a table with status badges. Clicking a row navigates to the job workspace.
user_interactions: View table with job rows for 201397 and 999001
Click a row to navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/:jobId

features.name: Global Left Navigation
features.description: Fixed left sidebar always visible. Links to Portfolio, Explorer, Base CV.

features.name: Job Workspace Shell
features.description: Pipeline topbar with breadcrumb and step tabs (Flow, Scrape, Extract, Match, Sculpt, Deployment).
user_interactions: View breadcrumb with Portfolio link, source, jobId
Click pipeline step tabs to navigate between job views

known_limitations.issue: All job sub-pages except JobFlowInspector (B1–B5) are stubs with placeholder text
known_limitations.impact: Navigation works but no real content yet

known_limitations.issue: Artifact links in StageRow navigate to
known_limitations.impact: Artifact links are visible but non-functional

known_limitations.issue: VITE_MOCK=true baked into production build — no real API calls
known_limitations.impact: All data comes from mock fixtures
